title: calamagrostis × baltica
intro: Calamagrostis × baltica, also known as Baltic reed grass, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is primarily used in traditional medicine, particularly in Europe, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis × baltica include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
